mapper.select: select a.* from rbac_data_authority a inner join rbac_user_data_authority ua on a.id = ua.data_auth_id where ua.user_id = #{userId}
select a.* from rbac_data_authority a inner join rbac_role_data_authority ra on a.id = ra.data_auth_id where ra.role_id = #{roleId}

select a.* from rbac_data_authority a inner join rbac_user_data_authority ua on a.id = ua.data_auth_id where ua.user_id = #{userId} union select a.* from rbac_data_authority a inner join rbac_role_data_authority ra on a.id = ra.data_auth_id inner join rbac_user_role rur on ra.role_id = rur.role_id where rur.user_id = #{userId}
